issues.detail: In 'Step 1 — Create an ECR repository', the sentence 'Docker decides where to push purely from the image tag, so this full URI *is* part of the tag you'll push to.' is inaccurate. The full URI (`<aws_account_id>.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/myapp`) is the *repository name* (or the registry URL + repository path), not 'part of the tag'. The tag is the identifier that comes *after* the colon (e.g., `:latest`, `:${commit}`). Docker decides where to push based on the *registry hostname* within the fully qualified image name, and the entire string up to the colon is the image name, where the tag is the final component after the colon.
